name: Hermas
Hermias
kontakia: (Tone 3) You glimmered over the earth like a star,* shining with the rays of Paul, who enlightened the ends of the earth like the sun, O blessed one.* Therefore, O Hermes, we venerate you.

(Tone 6) Having struggled eagerly for Christ,* you acquired courage even in old age, O martyr Hermias;* and having trampled the schemes of the lawless by the power of Christ,* you remained unharmed by sorcerous potions, crying aloud:** “God is with me! Nobody can stand against me!”
